steps.title: Substitute values into the kinetic energy formula
steps.content:
With KE = 18 joules and m = 4 kilograms, substitute into the formula:
$$18 = \frac{1}{2}(4)v^2$$
$$18 = 2v^2$$

steps.title: Solve for speed
steps.content:
Divide both sides by 2:
$$v^2 = 9$$
Take the positive square root:
$$v = 3 \text{ meters per second}$$
That matches the correct answer — A is correct.
